tools.name: list_products
tools.title: List research peptide products
tools.description: List PH Labs research-use-only peptide products with title, price (GBP), availability, and product URL. Data is fetched live from the public product feed.

limit.description: Maximum number of products to return. Defaults to 50.

tools.name: fetch_page
tools.title: Fetch a phlabs.co.uk page
tools.description: Fetch the HTML of a public page on https://phlabs.co.uk (e.g. '/', '/products', '/resources/some-slug'). Returns raw HTML text.

path.description: Path on phlabs.co.uk, must start with '/'. Example: '/products'.
